confirm.title: Confirm
confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

abort.no_devices_found: No ONF Light devices found. Make sure your light is powered on and in Bluetooth range.

init.title: Device Configuration
init.description: Adjust connection settings and configure up to 5 automatic lighting schedules. Schedules are stored on the device and run from its internal clock, no active Bluetooth connection is needed during scheduled operation.

data_description.poll_interval: How often HA reads the device state in the background. Set to 0 to disable.
data_description.idle_disconnect: Seconds of inactivity before HA drops the BLE connection. 0 to drop immediately after each command, -1 to stay permanently connected.
data_description.time_sync_interval: How often HA automatically sync the device clock. Set to 0 to disable. Default is 1440 (24 hours).
data_description.slot_1_enabled: Enable this timer slot. The schedule is pushed to the device and runs from its internal clock.
data_description.slot_1_start: The time the light turns on to the scheduled brightness.
data_description.slot_1_end: The time the light turns off at the end of the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_1_brightness: Light level during the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_1_color_temp: Color temperature in Kelvin for the scheduled period. Ignored on brightness-only devices.
data_description.slot_2_enabled: Enable this timer slot. The schedule is pushed to the device and runs from its internal clock.
data_description.slot_2_start: The time the light turns on to the scheduled brightness.
data_description.slot_2_end: The time the light turns off at the end of the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_2_brightness: Light level during the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_2_color_temp: Color temperature in Kelvin for the scheduled period. Ignored on brightness-only devices.
data_description.slot_3_enabled: Enable this timer slot. The schedule is pushed to the device and runs from its internal clock.
data_description.slot_3_start: The time the light turns on to the scheduled brightness.
data_description.slot_3_end: The time the light turns off at the end of the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_3_brightness: Light level during the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_3_color_temp: Color temperature in Kelvin for the scheduled period. Ignored on brightness-only devices.
data_description.slot_4_enabled: Enable this timer slot. The schedule is pushed to the device and runs from its internal clock.
data_description.slot_4_start: The time the light turns on to the scheduled brightness.
data_description.slot_4_end: The time the light turns off at the end of the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_4_brightness: Light level during the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_4_color_temp: Color temperature in Kelvin for the scheduled period. Ignored on brightness-only devices.
data_description.slot_5_enabled: Enable this timer slot. The schedule is pushed to the device and runs from its internal clock.
data_description.slot_5_start: The time the light turns on to the scheduled brightness.
data_description.slot_5_end: The time the light turns off at the end of the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_5_brightness: Light level during the scheduled period.
data_description.slot_5_color_temp: Color temperature in Kelvin for the scheduled period. Ignored on brightness-only devices.

set_timer.name: Set Timer
set_timer.description: Set a scheduled timer slot on an ONF Light device.

start_time.name: Start Time
start_time.description: Time when the light turns on to the scheduled brightness.

end_time.name: End Time
end_time.description: Time when the scheduled period ends.

brightness.name: Brightness
brightness.description: Brightness percentage for this scheduled period (0–100).

color_temp_kelvin.name: Color Temperature
color_temp_kelvin.description: Color temperature in Kelvin. Only applies to tunable-white devices.

clear_timer.name: Clear Timer
clear_timer.description: Clear one or all scheduled timer slots on an ONF Light device.

slot.name: Slot
slot.description: Timer slot to clear (1–5). Omit to clear all slots.
